data.title: Investors who lost money in C3.ai (NYSE: AI) urged to contact Wolf Haldenstein due to securities lawsuit. Deadline: October 21, 2025. Join the case now.
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff in the securities class action lawsuit against C3.ai, Inc. (NYSE: AI) is October 21, 2025, as per Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP. Interested investors can find more information and join the case by clicking on the provided link. The lawsuit concerns allegations related to the Company, with important details to be addressed within the specified timeframe.

data.title: The Joint Chiropractic opens first location in Delaware (Dover) as the nation's largest chiropractic care provider expands.
data.description: The initial branch of The Joint Corp., the leading provider of chiropractic care through The Joint Chiropractic® network in the U.S., has recently commenced operations in Dover, Delaware. This marks a significant milestone for the company. The inauguration took place on October 3, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona. The Joint Corp. is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol JYNT. This new clinic showcases The Joint's entrance into the Delaware market, expanding its retail presence.

data.title: XRP surpasses $3, indicating potential 40% gains in October. Key indicator hints at previous 575% rallies.
data.description: A significant indicator for XRP, which has historically anticipated surges of up to 575%, is once again signaling in October. This suggests that the price of XRP is potentially heading towards reaching new record highs.

data.title: Learn best practices for managing intellectual property in China at a training course on Nov 17-18, 2025. Topics include trademarks, patents, and enforcement procedures.
data.description: A training course titled "Best Practices for Doing Business with Intellectual Property in China" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com from November 17th to November 18th, 2025. The course aims to provide participants with a thorough understanding of effective strategies for handling intellectual property in China. It covers various aspects such as trademark and patent applications, along with enforcement processes. Attendees will receive a detailed overview of the Chinese IP system, enhancing their knowledge in this area.

data.title: Talon Capital Corp. to start separate trading of Class A Ordinary Shares & Warrants from Oct 8, 2025.
data.description: In Houston, Texas, on October 3, 2025, Talon Capital Corp. disclosed that starting from Wednesday, October 8, 2025, holders of the units from the Company's initial public offering have the option to independently trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants contained within the units.

data.title: Valparaiso University data breach alert issued; Wolf Haldenstein investigating claims for impacted individuals.
data.description: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading consumer rights law firm, is currently examining cases for individuals affected by a recent incident. The firm, based in New York and Chicago, is urging those impacted to submit their contact details for further investigation. The investigation aims to assist individuals who have been affected by the incident.

data.title: Dow Jones rises as jobs report delayed; Astera, Nvidia, Tesla stocks rally premarket. Live coverage from Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase as the release of the jobs report was postponed. Stocks of Astera, Nvidia, and Tesla surged before the market opened. This development was covered in a live report on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: $2,650 Mini Phil's Thrill Tourney added to ACR Poker's high-stakes schedule; players can qualify via satellites.
data.description: Players looking to participate in high-stakes poker tournaments have the opportunity to secure a seat at the $2,650 and premier $10,300 events through satellites. Building on the popularity of the Phil's Thrill high-stakes weekly tournament, ACR Poker is introducing a new event called Mini Phil's Thrill. This development comes from SAN JOSE, Costa Rica, and was announced on October 3, 2025.

data.title: Loss of money in Fly-E Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLYE) shares? Contact Wolf Haldenstein before Nov 7, 2025. Action against the company filed.
data.description: Important Update: Investors are reminded by Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP that the lead plaintiff deadline for the securities class action lawsuit against Fly-E Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLYE) is on November 7, 2025. The lawsuit was filed in New York and concerns Fly-E's actions. For more information and to take necessary action, please visit the provided link.

data.title: Northwest Medical Arts wins 2 gold and 2 silver awards, becoming the top med spa in the PNW. #Celebrations #Awards
data.description: A medical spa in Pierce County has achieved the remarkable feat of becoming the most successful in the entire Northwest region. Northwest Medical Arts (NWMA) recently received 2 gold and 2 silver awards, solidifying their reputation as a top-tier establishment. The Seattle Times recognized NWMA as the Best in the Pacific Northwest for their exceptional facials, a testament to their dedication to providing high-quality services. This achievement highlights NWMA's commitment to excellence and sets them apart as a leader in the industry.

data.description: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading consumer rights law firm, is currently examining cases on behalf of individuals affected by a recent issue. Residents in New York and Chicago are encouraged to provide their contact details for further investigation.

data.title: AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp. prices $120M IPO of 12M units at $10 each, led by CEO Michael Winston, to trade on NYSE as AIIAU.
data.description: AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp., a blank check company led by CEO Michael Winston, has priced its initial public offering at $10 per unit, raising a total of $120 million from the sale of 12 million units. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one right. The rights entitle holders to receive one-fifth of a Class A ordinary share upon the completion of the company's initial business combination. The units are set to be listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "AIIAU," with the Class A ordinary shares and rights to be traded separately under the symbols "AIIA" and "AIIAR," respectively. AIIA Sponsor Ltd., a subsidiary of Jet.AI Inc., a publicly listed AI data center company operating in Las Vegas, is a minority owner of the AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp.

data.title: Floor & Decor opens new store in Winston-Salem, NC with 35 full-time, 15 part-time associates at 3925 Oxford Station Way.
data.description: Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND), a prominent retailer specializing in hard-surface flooring for both homeowners and professionals, recently launched a new warehouse store and design center in Winston-Salem, NC, at 3925 Oxford Station Way, zip 27103. The opening saw the employment of around 35 full-time and 15 part-time staff members. Selena Sykes takes charge as the Chief Executive Merchant of the store.
